headline: Public Service Enterprise to Release Q1 Earnings: What to Expect?

headline: BofA Maintains Buy Rating on Eversource Energy (ES)
summary: Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) is one of the 7 Best Geothermal Stocks to Buy Now. On April 22, 2026, BofA analyst Ross Fowler lowered the price target on Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) to $72 from $73 and maintained a Buy rating. The firm estimates Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.58, slightly below consensus but higher year over year, […]
